summary: A Go-based monolithic CLI tool utilizing an AI agent orchestration framework (GOrchestra) to manage test execution, schema validation, and observability commands.
concerns: Proliferation of agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
High volume of *_extra_test.go files suggests potential test duplication or fragmented test coverage
Untracked and modified files in git status indicate incomplete commits or active unstable development
Heavy reliance on automated agent test generation may lead to brittle or low-value assertions
suggestions: Archive or remove merged GOrchestra/glm-agents/* directories to reduce repository noise
Consolidate fragmented extra tests into the standard test files to improve maintainability
Resolve the current dirty git status (7 modified, 1 staged, 3 untracked) before adding new features
Review the quality and necessity of agent-generated smoke tests to ensure they provide real value
